title: AI201 Project 6 CineLog — conceptual workstream board
caption: Conceptual workstream from the Project 6 (CineLog) homework chat — not literal git history. Hosted under lab6-grocerylist docs/ for github.io; not the GroceryList lab itself.

branches.label: Orient & API
branches.summary: No frontend; endpoints inferred from routes; optional HOST=0.0.0.0 for LAN; pytest is the primary verify path.

nodes.title: Orient on starter and projects.txt
nodes.detail: Submission center is pr-response.md + feature/watchlist work, not README study diagrams. Graded deliverable: branch URL, PR, conventional history, six comment responses.

nodes.title: Locate upstream PR #1 review comments
nodes.detail: Only jamjamgobambam/ai201-project6-cinelog-starter/pull/1. Ignore other students' PRs and drive-by comments on #1.

nodes.title: Confirm API-only no GUI
nodes.detail: GET / → 404 is expected. ReproduceOrInspect = read code, pytest, optional curl — nothing separate to submit for that step.

nodes.title: Map watchlist REST endpoints from routes
nodes.detail: GET /watchlist/{user_id}, POST /watchlist/{user_id}/add. Review comments mostly named services/tests, not a full API table — infer from routes/watchlist/watchlist.py.

nodes.title: Enable optional HOST bind for LAN curl
nodes.detail: Default remains 127.0.0.1; HOST=0.0.0.0 for other machines. Not a graded requirement.

branches.label: Six review comments
branches.summary: Code for 1–3, 5 (sort), 6 (UUID); written decisions for 4–5 in pr-response.md.

nodes.title: Comment 1 rename add_to_watchlist
nodes.detail: save_to_watchlist → add_to_watchlist to match verb_to_noun / add_to_collection; update route call site.

nodes.title: Comment 2 deduplication + 409
nodes.detail: Mirror collection: AlreadyInWatchlistError after film exists check; route maps 404 / 409.

nodes.title: Comment 5 date_added sort
nodes.detail: get_watchlist orders by WatchlistEntry.date_added.desc(); planning queue vs catalog title sort; parity with collection.

nodes.title: Comment 6 rebase UUID WatchlistEntry
nodes.detail: Rebase onto upstream/main UUID Film.id; restore WatchlistEntry with String(36) film_id after models dropped the class on rebase.

nodes.title: Comments 4 and 5 written decisions
nodes.detail: public=True for community discovery with privacy tradeoff deferred; newest-first with explicit rejection of alphabetical for personal queues.

branches.label: Git hygiene & submit
branches.summary: History cleaned and pushed; screenshot in pr-response. Remaining: fork PR body + Course Portal.

nodes.title: Conventional commits and interactive rebase
nodes.detail: rebase -i upstream/main (or HEAD~N). Todo list ≠ message buffer. fixup collapses docs. reword opens second vi screen for the real message.

nodes.title: Force-with-lease push after rewrite
nodes.detail: Plain push rejected non-fast-forward after rebase — expected. Do not pull (merge risk). Use --force-with-lease onto origin feature/watchlist.

nodes.title: git log screenshot in pr-response
nodes.detail: Placeholder in pr-response.md; dropped image via GitHub web editor (user-attachments URL).

nodes.title: OPEN: fork PR feature to main
nodes.detail: PR on YOUR fork: feature/watchlist → main (speculaas), not upstream class repo. Compare URL if banner missing.
commands: Paste PR Description from pr-response.md into the PR body

nodes.title: OPEN: Course Portal branch URL
nodes.detail: Submit https://github.com/speculaas/ai201-project6-cinelog-starter/tree/feature/watchlist with open PR, not a bare repo link to main.

branches.label: Tooling & meta
branches.summary: pytest, vi rebase mechanics, and this status-board reuse for future chats.

nodes.title: pytest workflow documented
nodes.detail: source .venv/bin/activate; pytest tests/ -v. Graders prioritize tests over browser UI.

nodes.title: vi rebase todo vs message buffer
nodes.detail: gg dG clears buffer; :cq aborts rebase; label after SHA on todo line is not the commit message; use reword's second buffer.

nodes.title: Status board pattern reused
nodes.detail: Copied app.js/styles/index from fed_print_seg docs/status; this JSON is the CineLog homework narrative.
